moments.title: World Cup Group Stage Heats Up
moments.blurb: The group stages of the FIFA World Cup 2026 are in full swing across North America, with teams battling for a place in the knockout rounds.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Who's been your standout player of the World Cup group stage so far? Every game is a must-watch!

angles.name: Team Performance Focus
angles.copy: Are the home nations doing enough in the World Cup? Plenty of talking points after the latest round of fixtures.

angles.name: Match Day Build-up
angles.copy: Big World Cup games coming up today! Who are you backing to make it through to the next round?

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival Kicks Off Next Week
moments.blurb: The world-famous Glastonbury Festival returns to Worthy Farm from June 24-28, featuring hundreds of artists across multiple stages.

angles.name: Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Glastonbury is just days away! Who are you most excited to see at Worthy Farm this year?

angles.name: Packing Essentials
angles.copy: Glasto countdown is ON! What are your absolute must-have festival essentials (besides wellies, obviously)?

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: With Glastonbury almost here, who do you think will deliver the most iconic headliner performance this year?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin Next Week
moments.blurb: The iconic Wimbledon Championships begin on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London.

angles.name: Tennis Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of grass-court action! Wimbledon kicks off next Monday. Who are you backing for the singles titles?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: It's almost time for strawberries and cream! What's your favourite Wimbledon tradition?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: Wimbledon brings a special buzz to London every year. Are you heading to SW19 or watching from home?

moments.title: New Chart Topper Dominates UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: A new track is dominating the UK Singles Chart this week, sparking debate among music fans.

angles.name: Chart Reaction
angles.copy: The UK Singles Chart has a new number one! Is it a worthy winner or are you still streaming something else?

angles.name: New Music Debate
angles.copy: Which new track should be climbing higher on the charts this week? Tell us what you're listening to!

angles.name: Artist Focus
angles.copy: Huge week for [Artist Name] as their latest single hits the top spot! What's your favourite track from them?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK, which started on June 1st, continues to deliver drama, romance, and villa bombshells nightly.

angles.name: Current Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What did you make of last night's episode?

angles.name: Favourite Islanders
angles.copy: Who's your favourite Islander this series and why? The villa is heating up!

angles.name: Bombshell Reaction
angles.copy: That bombshell last night! Did they shake things up enough or is more drama needed in the villa?

moments.title: Summer Solstice Tomorrow
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, falls tomorrow, Sunday June 21st, ushering in official summer.

angles.name: Longest Day Anticipation
angles.copy: Tomorrow is the Summer Solstice, the longest day of the year! How are you planning to make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Local Celebrations
angles.copy: Summer Solstice traditions are strong across the UK. Any special plans or places you'll be celebrating tomorrow, Devon?

angles.name: Welsh Summer
angles.copy: Haf hir hapus! The Summer Solstice arrives tomorrow. How will you be enjoying the longest day in Wales?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Lionel Richie!
moments.blurb: Music legend Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday today, with a career spanning decades of iconic hits.

angles.name: Iconic Hits
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! What's your go-to Lionel track?

angles.name: Feel Good Friday
angles.copy: It's Lionel Richie's birthday! Let's get 'All Night Long' on repeat to celebrate this music icon. What a legend!

angles.name: Timeless Tracks
angles.copy: From The Commodores to solo superstardom, Lionel Richie turns 77 today. His music is truly 'Easy Like Sunday Morning'.

moments.title: Lana Del Rey Turns 41 Tomorrow
moments.blurb: Acclaimed artist Lana Del Rey turns 41 tomorrow, known for her melancholic style and evocative lyrics.

angles.name: Unique Sound
angles.copy: Lana Del Rey turns 41 tomorrow! What's your favourite song from the artist known for her unique, cinematic sound?

angles.name: Evocative Lyrics
angles.copy: Celebrating Lana Del Rey's 41st birthday tomorrow! Which of her evocative lyrics resonates with you the most?

angles.name: Modern Icon
angles.copy: A true modern icon. Lana Del Rey celebrates her birthday tomorrow! What's your favourite album?

moments.title: Prince William Turns 44 Tomorrow
moments.blurb: Prince William, the Prince of Wales, celebrates his 44th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Royal Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 44th birthday to HRH The Prince of Wales, Prince William, tomorrow!

angles.name: National Figure
angles.copy: The Prince of Wales turns 44 tomorrow. A key figure in the UK, what's your favourite moment from his public life?

angles.name: London's Prince
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Prince William celebrates his 44th birthday! Sending best wishes from London.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday on Monday
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper will be 73 on Monday, famous for her vibrant style and empowering anthems.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true 80s icon! Cyndi Lauper turns 73 on Monday. What's your favourite hit from her?

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: It's almost Cyndi Lauper's birthday! Let's get 'Girls Just Want To Have Fun' on blast for her 73rd on Monday!

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: From punk princess to Broadway star, Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday Monday. A unique talent!

moments.title: Solange Knowles Turns 40 on Wednesday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning artist Solange Knowles turns 40 on Wednesday, celebrated for her experimental R&B and artistic vision.

angles.name: Artistic Vision
angles.copy: Solange Knowles turns 40 on Wednesday! What's your favourite album from this incredibly artistic and influential R&B star?

angles.name: Music & Style
angles.copy: Happy 40th to Solange on Wednesday! Her music and style are always ahead of the curve. What's your favourite Solange track?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wednesday is Solange's 40th birthday! Let's celebrate her incredible contribution to music.

moments.title: Carly Simon Celebrates 83rd Birthday on Thursday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for her classic hits and poetic lyrics, celebrates her 83rd birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Classic Hits
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Carly Simon on Thursday! 'You're So Vain' is still an absolute classic.

angles.name: Timeless Songwriter
angles.copy: Carly Simon turns 83 on Thursday! Her songwriting is truly timeless. What's your favourite of her poetic tracks?

angles.name: Bond Theme Queen
angles.copy: Nobody Does It Better! Wishing Carly Simon a very happy 83rd birthday this Thursday. What a voice!

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday on Friday
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande turns 33 on Friday, continuing to dominate charts with her powerful vocals and catchy tracks.

angles.name: Pop Dominance
angles.copy: Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Friday! Which of her chart-topping hits is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Vocal Queen
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday this Friday! Her vocal range is simply incredible. What's your favourite performance?

angles.name: New Music & Milestones
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global superstar, Ariana Grande turns 33 on Friday. What a career!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger Turns 48 Next Monday
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday next Monday.

angles.name: Pussycat Dolls Nostalgia
angles.copy: Next Monday, Nicole Scherzinger turns 48! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit to celebrate?

angles.name: TV Personality
angles.copy: From pop star to TV judge, Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday next Monday! What's your favourite show she's been on?

angles.name: Solo & Group Hits
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 48th birthday to Nicole Scherzinger next Monday! Her solo tracks and Pussycat Dolls anthems are pure fire.
